title: tanacetum krylovianum
intro: Tanacetum krylovianum, also known as Krylov's tansy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum krylovianum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
